title: Green Bean Zest
description: An earthy, fluffy, energizing Spanish dish featuring green beans, deglazed with a touch of garlic and olive oil to create a light yet satisfying snack or side dish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Add the cooked green beans to the skillet, tossing well with the garlic mixture.
Deglaze the skillet with the water or vegetable stock, scraping up any crispy bits from the bottom of the pan.
Fold in lemon zest and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
